name: leadbay
description: AI lead discovery, qualification, and outreach prep. Sign in with Leadbay OAuth, then ask Claude to find, research, and prepare outreach on B2B prospects.
long_description: Leadbay MCP surfaces your Leadbay inbox to Claude — fresh daily batches of AI-qualified leads, deep research on any company or contact, outreach-ready prep (email + LinkedIn), and outreach logging. On first launch, Claude Desktop opens Leadbay in your browser so you can authorize access with OAuth. Requires a Leadbay account (https://leadbay.ai).

leadbay_mcp_write.title: Enable write tools
leadbay_mcp_write.description: Allow Claude to call composite write tools (refine_prompt, adjust_audience, report_outreach, bulk_qualify_leads, enrich_titles, answer_clarification, import_leads). ON by default since 0.3.0 — turn this off only if you want a strictly read-only agent.
